text:
There once was a rabbit named Randy who loved cookies. Every day after finishing his chores, Randy would hop around munching his favorite treat.

One day Randy discovered an old box buried beneath his nest. Inside lay hundreds of sugar cookies! Thrilled with joy, Randy dove right in.

Hours later Randy lay belly-up pantagraph-ing. Bits had flown right into his lungs.

A squirrel listened close.

"Oh dear!"

Just then Randy opened his eyes.

"Oh oh!"

"What?"

Just watch."

I'll catch those!"

"That looks harmless."

Yes yes yes!

Splits flew Randy wide awake.

"Oh no!"

The squirrel giggled.

"Well Randy?"

Just eat 'em.

What?! No!

That's just bad manners.

I just did.

Just eat!

Maybe if I eat lots?

Maybe cookies wouldn't hurt?

Well think again.

Just eat.

It's funny.

Well Randy just snatched 'em up.

Then ran!

Oh dear.

Now me.

Well?

You'd never catch me that
